---
title: "Information Asymmetry: Hidden Information vs Hidden Roles"
aliases: []
family: "Players & Social Dynamics"
media: []
facets:
  effects: []
  problems: []
  components: []
  genre: []
provenance: ""
---

## Referenced by

- [Information Architecture](../puzzles-clues-information/information-architecture.qmd)
